notableEvents.label: Tim Tawa pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tim Tawa grounds out, shortstop Ryan Kreidler to first baseman Royce Lewis.

notableEvents.label: Tim Tawa pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tim Tawa walks. Tommy Troy to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Byron Buxton grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Byron Buxton hits a grand slam (24) to right center field. Luke Keaschall scores. Ryan Kreidler scores. Trevor Larnach scores.

notableEvents.label: Kyler Fedko pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyler Fedko grounds out, shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Pavin Smith.

notableEvents.label: Kyler Fedko pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyler Fedko walks. Ryan Kreidler to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Josh Bell GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Bell grounds into a double play, shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Pavin Smith. Austin Martin out at 2nd. Josh Bell out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Josh Bell rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Bell grounds into a double play, shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Pavin Smith. Austin Martin out at 2nd. Josh Bell out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
